action.reasoning: Observation: best hidden EER remains 0.2538 from checkpoints/best_codec.pt; continued fine-tuning, clean+codec ensemble, and XLS-R all worsened. Analysis: with only 4 iterations left, the safest high-value experiment is to evaluate existing intermediate codec checkpoints separately because clean dev selection is not predictive under hidden codec conditions and epoch1/epoch2 may differ substantially. This requires no code changes and preserves the known-good predict.py path. Decision: submit checkpoints/codec_epoch1.pt for hidden evaluation first.
